channel.title: 1940s on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in 1940s on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Project Sign report
item.description:
Project Sign, also known as Project Saucer, was a U.S. Air Force study of unidentified flying objects active for most of 1948. Established to collect and evaluate UFO sighting information due to potential national security concerns, it was the precursor to Project Grudge. A public paper released in 1949 stated that while some UFOs appeared to be actual aircraft, their origins could not be determined due to insufficient data. The project investigated claims related to inventor Jonathan Edward Caldwell’s disk-rotor aircraft, but found they could not explain the widespread “flying saucer” reports.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Project_Sign
